events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rolling! Happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Forty-five years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era. What was the first video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment for Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Which track from the album still gives you that 'live forever' feeling?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off three days of peace, love, and music. Which iconic performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still 'Brass in Pocket' after all these years. What's your favourite Pretenders tune?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis legend and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite track from the man himself?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is recognised globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and all the iconic theme tunes. Which Bond song is your favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine 86
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the incomparable John Lennon. His message of peace and love resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian and actor, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty, what's your favourite Cleese moment?
